scripts.build: npm run build -w @vistal/core && npm run build -w @vistal/prisma && npm run build -w @vistal/clickhouse && npm run build -w @vistal/mcp-sdk && npm run build -w @vistal/mcp
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/prisma && tsc --noEmit -p packages/clickhouse && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp-sdk && tsc --noEmit -p packages/mcp
